title: BetterCombat x L_Ender 's Cataclysm
description: BetterCombat x L_Ender 's Cataclysm Compatibility Datapack
body:
**BetterCombat x L_Ender's Cataclysm** — is a datapack that offers compatibility between the missing [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm) and [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat). 

## ⚙️ Compatibility

* [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/mod/l_enders-cataclysm)
* [Lionfish-API](https://modrinth.com/mod/lionfish-api)
* [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios)
* [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat)
* [playerAnimator](https://modrinth.com/mod/playeranimator)
* [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

## 💬 Community
Join our [community on the discord server](https://discord.gg/nSJBpkeVv6) to chat, ask questions, or share your creations!
